summary: Frontend-only validation of Projects cylinder changes. Prev/Next arrows fully removed. Card clicks correctly open respective external URLs in new tab (window.open intercepted). Drag does not trigger navigation. Fullscreen toggle works and locks body scroll. No horizontal scroll at 1440 or 390. No runtime error overlay.

test_results.clickable_cards_pointer_events: 4 of 6 cards have pointerEvents=auto (front-facing); rear 2 correctly non-clickable

critical_code_review_comments: Dormant detail modal (selected state, project-detail-modal, project-detail-close, project-detail-link) still exists in Projects.jsx but is never triggered — safe but dead code that can be removed for clarity.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Projects cylinder: arrows removed, card->window.open(link,'_blank') works, drag guard (moved<6) works. Verified via window.open interception at 1440 desktop; also checked mobile 390 (no h-scroll).
